headline: PLD vs. FRT: Which REIT Has the Better Growth Story?
summary: Prologis appears to outpace Federal Realty with larger logistics scale, data center and energy growth lanes, strong occupancy and raised 2026 guidance.

headline: REM and MORT Pay Over 9% Yields, But Both Have Lost Money Over Five Years
summary: There are variations in some asset class categories that can vary widely. For example, technology stocks can be involved with anything from hardware to semiconductors to software and A.I. The Real Estate/REIT sector is another one that can defy easy pigeonholing. Some REITs, such as Realty Income (NYSE: O) actually own and manage a ...
